creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 211576
patch for audio/libopenshot-audio

Use a new tag of v0.1.9.
Change how DISTVERSION are divided. This allows rewinding without increase PORTEPOCH.
Changing files/patch-CMakeLists.txt and removing files/patch-src_CMakeLists.txt make it possible to link execinfo to eliminate symbol table problems.
